title: DRDO MTRDC Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
organization: Microwave Tube Research and Development Centre (DRDO MTRDC)
short_info: Microwave Tube Research and Development Centre (DRDO MTRDC) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on the official website DRDO. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO MTRDC Paid Internship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Final year B.Tech / M.Tech / M.Sc students in specified disciplines with minimum 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA from AICTE/UGC approved institutions
qualification.details: Final year UG/PG students pursuing full time course in respective discipline from recognized Indian University/Institute with 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA. Disciplines include: Electronics Engineering/ECE/EIE, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Physics.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Paid Internship ship (Electronics Engineering/ECE/EIE, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Physics)

selection_process: CGPA based shortlisting Online interview / interaction Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO MTRDC Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
